title: Process Signals, Abort Trees, Listener Cleanup, and Graceful Shutdown · Contract Lens: Pokedex Ts Listener Lifecycle
summary: Every request owns an unrelated controller, SIGINT calls process.exit immediately, event listeners accumulate, pending readline and fetch work survive close, and aborted work prints as a defect. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts listener lifecycle increment in composed abort-aware Node session lifecycle. Learners progress t…
objectives: Use once or signal-bound listeners, remove handlers on completion, and prove no listener-count growth across commands.
Compose session, command, timeout, and waiter signals while preserving reason and avoiding controller ownership confusion.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
